title: Fissistigma fulgens
taxonomy: Fissistigma fulgens is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae. This family consists of over 2,000 species of flowering plants, commonly known as the custard-apple or soursop family. The Annonaceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world, with many species found in Southeast Asia.
